Short CV

Lecturer Ömer Faruk OKUYUCU, was born in 1982 in Kadıköy is originally from Antakya.. Primary and secondary education in Tunceli and İskenderun, İskenderun's high school education at the High School, graduated from Istanbul University Faculty of Science degree in Physics section.

Teachers in different areas of the education sector, group president, author, editor, counselors, directors and managers worked 13 years. Management, Leadership, Entrepreneurship, Marketing, Communication Skills, Time Management, Personal Development, General Psychology, Occupational Health and Safety, educator, has taken several trainings on first aid. Guidance Foundation has given many seminars and training related. Published in many physics courses, training and books on current events, magazines, and broadcast are tested.

Because he thought it reaches saturation sector in 2013 she began working as a lecturer at the University of Üsküdar. Medical Documentation and Secretarial Program Coordinator, also Health Services Vocational School Deputy Director of the Ömer Faruk OKUYUCU still Üsküdar University Institute of Health Sciences is continuing its Occupational Health and Safety Program of the postgraduate program.
